query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS company_settings (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT 1,
  name VARCHAR(255),
  legal_form VARCHAR(100),
  street VARCHAR(255),
  zip VARCHAR(20),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Deutschland',
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  email VARCHAR(255),
  website VARCHAR(255),
  tax_number VARCHAR(100),
  vat_id VARCHAR(100),
  iban VARCHAR(50),
  bic VARCHAR(20),
  bank_name VARCHAR(255),
  logo_url TEXT,
  logo_key TEXT,
  invoice_footer TEXT,
  kleinunternehmer TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT,
  updated_at BIGINT
);
